name: ChaingeFinance
report: The attacker exploited an arbitrary external call vulnerability in the `swap` function of the MinterProxyV2 contract. By controlling the `target` and `callData` parameters, the attacker crafted a call that invoked the `transferFrom` function of any ERC20 token. This allowed them to transfer out the entire approved token balance from a victim address (0x8a4a) that had previously granted unlimited approval to the vulnerable contract, resulting in the theft of multiple tokens.
